heading: Unlink Your Organization from Azure
body:
If you are an Azure (Microsoft Azure) Subscription Owner or a Contributor, you can unlink your MongoDB Atlas instance from
Azure (Microsoft Azure), which unlinks the Atlas organization from Azure Native Integration and Azure (Microsoft Azure) marketplace billing,
but doesn't delete the organization in Atlas.

If paid clusters exist on the organization when Azure (Microsoft Azure) billing is removed, users will need to provide a payment
method within Atlas to avoid the suspension or termination of services.
